title: Term Two Opening Day
summary: Classes resume for all pre-primary and primary learners. Parents are encouraged to confirm transport and meal preferences one week before opening.

title: Parent Reading Morning
summary: Parents are invited to join guided reading sessions and observe Abela's literacy routines for pre-primary and Standard I-II.

title: Assessment Week Notice
summary: Mid-term assessments begin for Standard III-VI. Revision support plans will be shared through class communication books and WhatsApp groups.
